mapper.insert: INSERT INTO resume_template_field ( id, template_id, user_id, template_version, field_id, section_key, display_name, source_text, source_text_hash, location_refs_json, style_fingerprint_json, max_chars, max_lines, required_evidence_policy, unsupported_regions_json ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{templateId}, #{userId}, #{templateVersion}, #{fieldId}, #{sectionKey}, #{displayName}, #{sourceText}, #{sourceTextHash}, #{locationRefsJson}, #{styleFingerprintJson}, #{maxChars}, #{maxLines}, #{requiredEvidencePolicy}, #{unsupportedRegionsJson} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, template_id, user_id, template_version, field_id, section_key, display_name, source_text, source_text_hash, location_refs_json, style_fingerprint_json, max_chars, max_lines, required_evidence_policy, unsupported_regions_json, created_at, updated_at FROM resume_template_field WHERE template_id = #{templateId} AND template_version = #{templateVersion} ORDER BY created_at ASC, id ASC
